title: WS1 handoff owner clarification
body: Floating Lifting Thermal has the active handoff claim c98b9955 on the canonical WS1 handoff surfaces. I saw Zephyrous's simultaneous closeout-owner note and Shaded's detailed closeout input; I am incorporating those into one canonical record rather than creating competing handoffs. No git/index work in this handoff. Please add only corrections or missing blockers/positives in comms; otherwise I will close the claim after final live-state checks.
